capability bottleneck.successCriterion: target capability score improves with observation-backed evidence
capability bottleneck.stopCondition: no improvement after retry budget exhausted

governance bottleneck.successCriterion: blocking governance condition is explained or cleared
governance bottleneck.stopCondition: policy remains blocked after retry budget exhausted

evidence bottleneck.successCriterion: required evidence is captured and linked
evidence bottleneck.stopCondition: required evidence cannot be captured in current context

observation bottleneck.successCriterion: observation count increases with non-rejected evidence
observation bottleneck.stopCondition: observation recorder continues to reject required evidence
observation bottleneck.revertCondition: observation quality drops below fail-closed thresholds

scope/coverage bottleneck.successCriterion: supported family gains passing or failing evidence instead of no evidence
